scope: Operation-ledger inventory for parent issue #82: 367 documented monday.com GraphQL operations from canonical reference pages (87 query, 280 mutation). Count rule: # Queries/# Mutations headings with GraphQL examples; app-framework/marketplace/platform reference pages are outside the connector data surface. Query rows are declared as semantic GET rows even though monday.com GraphQL transport uses POST; mutation rows are POST and blocked by default.

operation.notes: planned stream ETL candidate
